problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: Combining Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
